content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Patched the two pending failure-reconciliation gaps additively. `failure_reconciliation.rs` now backfills a missing historical `BeadFailed` journal event even when a newer failed retry already exists, so stale same-`run_id` replays no longer undercount failures before escalation. I also added exact-attempt terminal event matching in `project_run_record::queries`, then wired both `daemon_loop.rs` and `cli/run.rs` to require the current attempt’s `run_failed` event instead of binding failure metadata to the last event with the same `run_id`. The regression suite now covers newer-failed stale replay repair, CLI rejection of stale prior `run_failed` events after resume, daemon rejection of stale resumed-attempt failure metadata, and snapshot-fallback success only when the exact attempt has a matching durable `run_failed` event.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Added exact-attempt terminal-event lookup in `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs` and reused it so failure metadata is scoped to the resolved attempt boundary instead of any prior event with the same `run_id`.
2. [Completed] Updated `src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs` so stale replays repair missing historical `BeadFailed` journal rows even when a newer failed retry already exists, preserving durable retry counting toward `MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES`.
3. [Completed] Tightened `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` and `src/cli/run.rs` to fail closed when the current attempt lacks a matching durable `run_failed` event, while still allowing exact snapshot-attempt fallback when that durable failure event exists.
4. [Completed] Expanded regression coverage for stale same-`run_id` replay repair, resumed-attempt stale-`run_failed` rejection, and snapshot-attempt matching, then ran the required Rust validation suite and launched the required `nix build` gate.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- Focused regressions passed: `cargo test failure_reconciliation -- --nocapture`, `cargo test sync_terminal_milestone_task_rejects_stale_run_failed_from_prior_resumed_attempt -- --nocapture`, and `cargo test --features test-stub contexts::automation_runtime::daemon_loop::tests::try_reconcile_failure -- --nocapture`.
- `cargo test` passed on the full suite after updating the legacy failed-start regression fixture to use an attempt start timestamp consistent with its durable `run_failed` journal event.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passed.
- `cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix build` was launched and reached `/nix/store/8z3pfqsh5gwd40d49v40jxb9zj16s5ga-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv`, but no final exit status was observed in-session.

## Outstanding Risks

- `nix build` was launched on the updated tree and remained in the active musl derivation build stage without returning a final success/failure status in-session, so the authoritative Nix gate is still unresolved.
